title: Boston Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Boston with a Z-Score of -3.51. This event is rated CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Boston are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The HDD value of 13.3 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 62% and wind speed of 3.6 km/h will exacerbate the cold conditions, making it feel even colder.
